cases.input: Read Summary!A1:D20 from a known spreadsheet with spreadsheets.values.get and no mutation.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a read-only values.get plan with spreadsheet ID, A1 range, render options, and spreadsheets.readonly scope.

cases.input: Create a new KPI workbook after reviewing template metadata.
cases.expected_behavior: Plans spreadsheets.get before spreadsheets.create and requires confirmed human approval.

cases.input: Add a Raw tab, protected range, and formatting with spreadsheets.batchUpdate.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses spreadsheets.batchUpdate, validates request list, and records atomic batch behavior.

cases.input: Update Summary!A1:D2 with USER_ENTERED values after reading metadata.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires ValueRange shape, valueInputOption, read-only-first, and confirmation.

cases.input: Append weekly metrics to Raw!A:D with INSERT_ROWS.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses spreadsheets.values.append with table-range awareness, insertDataOption, and confirmation.

cases.input: Write Summary and Config ranges in one values.batchUpdate request.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses spreadsheets.values.batchUpdate with multiple ValueRange objects and one valueInputOption.

cases.input: Update cells in a spreadsheet but skip human confirmation.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic script rejects the mutation because human_confirmation.status is not confirmed.

cases.input: Start a Sheets create/update workflow directly with spreadsheets.create.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic script rejects the workflow because mutating plans must start with read-only discovery.

cases.input: Use OAuth scopes only for the Raw sheet tab.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects sheet/tab-level OAuth scope binding because official Sheets scopes apply to spreadsheet files.

cases.input: Summarize a CSV pasted in chat without using Google Sheets or MCP.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request has no Google Sheets, spreadsheet ID, A1 range, or MCP intent.
